name: Crockpot Fondue Italiano
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet or crock-pot with a browning unit, cook the beef until crumbly; pour off excess fat.
2. In the crock-pot, combine the beef with dry spaghetti sauce mix, tomato sauce, cheddar and mozzarella cheeses. Cover and cook on low for 2 hours.
3. Dissolve cornstarch in the wine.
4. Turn control to high. Add dissolved cornstarch. Heat on high for 10 to 15 minutes.
5. Dip chunks of Italian bread into the fondue while keeping the mixture hot in the crock-pot. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
